system.game_start: The game begins — Good luck everyone. (/skip to skip the day)
system.peaceful_night: The night was peaceful. Nobody died.
system.mayor_reveal: {{name}} revealed themselves as Mayor! Their votes count triple.
system.player_eliminated: {{name}} was eliminated by the village. Their role was: {{role}}.
system.player_eliminated_will: {{name}} was eliminated by the village. Their role was: {{role}}. | Last Will: "{{will}}"
system.player_afk: {{name}} is inactive — their actions will be skipped.

notifications.jailed: You were jailed by the Jailor!
notifications.roleblocked: Someone prevented you from acting tonight.
notifications.bodyguard_saved: A bodyguard sacrificed themselves to protect you!
notifications.bodyguard_sacrifice: You sacrificed yourself to protect your target.
notifications.protection_saved: You were attacked but your protection saved you!
notifications.night_immune: Someone tried to kill you, but you survived!
notifications.vigilante_guilt: You killed an innocent... Guilt consumes you.
notifications.spy_no_visit: The mafia didn't visit anyone tonight.
notifications.executioner_to_jester: Your target died... You are now a Jester. Get yourself lynched!
notifications.jail_protected: You were in jail, you were protected.
notifications.converted_to_cult: You have been converted to the Cult. Join your new brethren...
notifications.conversion_failed_mafia: Cannot convert {{name}} — they belong to the Mafia.
notifications.conversion_failed_jailed: Cannot convert {{name}} — they were in jail.
notifications.conversion_failed_disagreement: Cultists couldn't agree on a target — nobody was converted tonight.
notifications.cult_vote_summary: Tonight the followers mostly voted to convert {{name}} ({{count}}/{{total}}).

mafia: was found riddled with bullets at dawn.
was found lifeless in a dark alley... a clean execution.
was found dead at home. A professional job.
was found gunned down in front of their door.
didn't survive the night... the Mafia shows no mercy.
sk: was found in a pool of blood... the work of a psychopath.
was found lacerated behind the tavern.
was found mutilated... an act of pure madness.
vigilante: was found shot dead... vigilante justice?
was found with a bullet in the heart... a vigilante struck.
jailor: was found dead in their cell at dawn.
death_messages.unknown: was found dead under mysterious circumstances.
death_messages.vigilante_suicide: {{name}} committed suicide from guilt. Their role was: Vigilante.
death_messages.protection_success: {{name}} was attacked, but was saved by the doctor.

gameover.xp_hint: Log in to save your XP
gameover.accused_defense: {{name}} is accused! Time to defend yourself.

action_tooltips.KILL: Eliminate a player tonight. Basic attack — a Doctor, a Vest or a Bodyguard can counter it.
action_tooltips.MAFIA_KILL: The mafia eliminates a player tonight. One target per night, coordinated in mafia chat. Basic attack.
action_tooltips.VIGILANTE_KILL: Shoot a player. 2 bullets max. Forbidden on night 1. Killing a town player makes you die of guilt the next night.
action_tooltips.SK_KILL: Stab silently. Your attack ignores the Doctor (unstoppable on target). The Bodyguard intercepts you.
action_tooltips.HEAL: Heal a player: blocks one basic attack tonight. Ineffective against an unstoppable attack (Jailor execute).
action_tooltips.PROTECT: Protect a player from a basic attack tonight. Does not stop an unstoppable attack.
action_tooltips.BODYGUARD: If your target is attacked, you kill the attacker and die. Powerful attack (level 2), ignores basic immunity.
action_tooltips.VEST: Bulletproof vest for tonight. Blocks one basic attack. 3 uses max per game.
action_tooltips.INVESTIGATE: Binary result: "suspicious" or "not suspicious". The Godfather appears non-suspicious. A Framer can fool you (1 night).
action_tooltips.INVESTIGATE_ROLE: Reveals the target's exact role. The Framer cannot fool you. One target per night, locked on first click.
action_tooltips.LOOKOUT: Lists the players who visited your target tonight. Roleblocked or already-dead visitors don't appear.
action_tooltips.SPY: Learns who the mafia visited tonight. Does not see Cult or Serial Killer targets.
action_tooltips.JAIL: Jail during the day, for the night. Roleblocks + protects from attacks. Anonymous chat with the prisoner.
action_tooltips.JAILOR_EXECUTE: Unstoppable attack: ignores Doctor, night immunity and vest. 3 executions max.
action_tooltips.ROLEBLOCK: Blocks all the target's actions. Resolves before everything else. Works on the Godfather.
action_tooltips.FRAME: Makes the target appear suspicious to the Sheriff — for this night ONLY. The Consigliere still sees the real role.
action_tooltips.BLACKMAIL: Target cannot speak in public chat the next day. Can still vote and act. Effect lasts 1 day.
action_tooltips.REVEAL: Reveal your Mayor role (once per game). Your vote counts 3, but you can no longer be healed by the Doctor.
action_tooltips.CULT_VOTE: Conversion vote. Every living cultist must vote for the same target for a conversion to happen tonight.

chat.dead_no_will: Dead players can't write a will.
chat.skip_only_day: Skip only available during discussion or voting.

vigilante_night1: Cannot shoot on the first night
judgment_default_guilty: Guilty by default — vote Innocent to save

scene.no_lynch: Everyone can go home safely tonight.

last_will_placeholder_write: E.g.: I checked Alex on night 2, he's clean. Don't trust Sam...
ambiance: A black cat slowly crosses the village square...
Furtive footsteps echo in the alley...
A shadow slips between the houses...
The torches flicker in the darkness...
A light goes out in a distant house...
The gallows creak in the wind...
The moon disappears behind the clouds for a moment...
A shutter slams somewhere in the village...
The fog thickens around the village...
A crow caws in the distance...
The air is thick with tension tonight...
day_rising_variants: The bells ring in the morning...
The sun pierces between the rooftops...
The streets stir back to life...
night_transition_variants: The day dies over the village...
The sun sinks behind the hills...
Lanterns flicker to life, one by one...
peaceful_night_variants: The night was peaceful. Nobody died.
Not a drop of blood this night.
A night without incident — for once.
The doors stayed shut, and so did the graves.
